description: Style Note Inspired from India's rich jewel history, this pair of earrings from royal diadem is sure to become a love-forever statement piece in your jewellery box. Style this with matching ethnic suits or saris or wear it with a monochrome ensemble for an interesting fusion vibe. This piece is guaranteed to give your look an instant boho edge (if it's a Western outfit) or a refined polish (if paired with ethnic wear) Product DetailsFlower shaped earring with purple stone embellishments  Has a purple bead danglerHas a fish hook closureMaterial and CareGold plated metalWipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 8.5 cm Style NoteInspired from India's rich jewel history, this pair of earrings from Royal Diadem is sure to become a love-forever statement piece in your jewellery box.
